title: Choose the Right AI Agent Architecture Without Overbuilding
titleCandidates: Stop Building Multi-Agent Systems Before You Need Them
Choose the Right AI Agent Architecture Without Overbuilding
AI Agent Architecture: A Practical Decision Ladder
description:
Choosing an AI agent architecture is not a contest to add the most agents. This video gives you a practical decision ladder for starting simple, matching workflow patterns to uncertainty, and adding autonomy only when measured results improve.

What you'll learn:
- How to distinguish a fixed workflow from a genuinely autonomous agent
- When to use chaining, routing, parallelization, orchestrator-workers, or evaluator-optimizer
- How to control autonomy with environmental feedback, permissions, stopping conditions, and clear tool interfaces

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
00:52 Architecture Choice
02:23 Core Building Block
03:52 Workflow Patterns
07:47 Autonomous Agents
10:01 Tool Design
11:26 Decision Method
12:51 Summary
